summary: Completed frontend testing of SEO improvements and blog section for Rakestake.com. All requested features working correctly: Blog page with 6 SEO-optimized articles, category filters, search functionality; VIP page with gamification (daily challenges, weekly missions, XP progress, streak tracking); Dashboard with tabs (redirects to login when not authenticated); Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes correctly with Blog link visible.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with Blog link in desktop navigation
Blog page loads at /blog with 'RAKESTAKE BLOG' badge and 'Crypto Casino Insights' heading
Blog page shows 2 featured articles and 6 total articles
Blog search functionality works - filtering articles by search term
Blog category filters work (All, Guides, Reviews, Comparisons, Strategy, Education)
Blog article detail page loads at /blog/what-is-rakeback-guide
Blog article shows title, author, date, read time, content, tags
Blog article shows 'Back to Blog' button that navigates correctly
Blog article shows 3 related articles
Blog article shows CTA 'Get Started Free' button
VIP page loads with 'Rakestake VIP Rewards' heading
VIP page shows XP progress card (Silver level, 2,500 XP, 5% Rakeback)
VIP page shows '7 Day Streak' with 'Bonus XP Active' indicator
VIP page shows progress bar '7,500 XP to Gold'
VIP page shows Daily Challenges section with 3 challenges (Daily Wager, Slot Spinner, Refer a Friend)
VIP page shows Weekly Missions section with 3 missions
VIP page shows 'Resets in 14h 32m' timer for daily challenges
VIP page shows 5 VIP tiers (Bronze 2%, Silver 5%, Gold 8%, Platinum 12%, Diamond 15%)
VIP page shows Partner Casinos section with search and casino cards
VIP page has 1 claimable reward button visible
Dashboard redirects to login when not authenticated (protected route working)
Mobile hamburger menu toggle button visible on mobile viewport
Mobile menu opens when toggle clicked (shows X icon)
Mobile menu shows all 8 nav links (Home, VIP Club, Blog, Verifiers, Slots API, Stats, Login, Create Account)
Mobile menu Blog link navigates to /blog correctly
Mobile menu closes after navigation
Mobile menu closes when toggle clicked again
Footer shows '© 2026 Rakestake.com'
critical_code_review_comments: Blog.js correctly implements SEO-optimized articles with proper structure (title, excerpt, content, category, tags, date, readTime)
Blog.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing (blog-search, category-*, article-*, featured-article-*, back-to-blog, article-cta)
VIPHub.js correctly implements gamification with daily challenges, weekly missions, XP progress, and streak tracking
VIPHub.js has proper data-testid attributes (challenge-*, mission-*, claim-*, vip-tier-*, casino-search)
Dashboard.js correctly implements 4 tabs (overview, casinos, referrals, history) with proper data-testid attributes
Header.js correctly implements mobile menu with CSS transitions instead of conditional rendering
Header.js has proper data-testid attributes for mobile nav (mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu-dropdown, mobile-nav-*)
index.html has comprehensive SEO meta tags including Open Graph, Twitter cards, and structured data

mocked_data.note: All data is MOCKED on frontend - no backend changes
mocked_items: Blog articles are hardcoded in Blog.js (6 articles)
VIP challenges/missions are mocked in VIPHub.js
Dashboard stats are mocked in Dashboard.js
XP progress (2,500 XP, Silver level) stored in localStorage

seed_data_creation: None - all data is mocked on frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO improvements and blog section fully implemented. Blog page at /blog has 6 SEO-optimized articles covering crypto casino topics (rakeback guide, best casinos 2025, Stake vs Shuffle comparison, strategies, VIP programs, provably fair gaming). VIP page has gamification with daily challenges (Daily Wager, Slot Spinner, Refer a Friend), weekly missions (High Roller, Explorer, Consistent), XP progress tracking, and 7-day streak indicator. Dashboard has 4 tabs but requires authentication. Mobile hamburger menu fixed with CSS transitions. All data is MOCKED on frontend.
